status.title: Status
status.description: Current status of the order, e.g. Pending, Shipped, Delivered.

expected_ship_date.title: Expected Ship Date
expected_ship_date.description: ISO 8601 date when the order is expected to ship. Empty if already shipped or unknown.

tracking_url.title: Tracking URL
tracking_url.description: Carrier tracking URL. Empty if not yet shipped.
